channel.title: Sopaan on Podbharati | पॉडभारती
channel.description: Recent content in Sopaan on Podbharati | पॉडभारती

item.title: आईएएस परीक्षा में सफलता के गुर: विजेंद्र सिंह चौहान से बातचीत | IAS Civil Services Exam
item.description: In this episode, veteran educator and coach Vijender Singh Chauhan ‘Masijeevi’ demystifies the Civil Services Examination and provides useful tips for IAS aspirants; a passing thought for the occasions that demand “daring”, and an interesting anecdote of an investment opportunity that the sharks refused in the recently concluded, maiden season, of Shark Tank India show. Will they regret it, like the sharks from the original American show did 9 years ago?

item.title: इंन्वेंशन और इन्नोवेशन में क्या फर्क है? कैसे लिया जाता है पेटेंट?
item.description: In this episode, motivator Ankur Warikoo warns against a mistake we often make; then we talk about Invention & Innovation and discuss the nuances of Patent from Alok Govil, Principle Engineer at Amazon, who has credits for several patents, and an interesting story of Cats & Parachutes.

item.title: लोकनीति में शिक्षा और करियर विकल्पः प्रणय कोटस्थने से बातचीत | Career options in Public Policy
item.description: Looking for a #jobchange, but unsure whether this is the opportune time? Fret not! Anurag Kale shares his simple 3Q framework to help you make an informed decision about the move. What is Public Policy, and what kind of learning and career opportunities does it provide? Pranay Kotasthane, Deputy Director at The Takshashila Institution, demystifies it for you. Plus, funny anecdotes of some talented entrepreneurs and innovators, who have also been, dare we say, bit #eccentric.

item.title: प्रॉडक्ट मैनेजमेंट में करियर: जया झा से साक्षात्कार | Career in Product Management
item.description: In the second episode of Sopaan, Jaya Jha, former Product Manager at Google, founder of Pothi.com and “The Practical PM” and author of So, you want to be a Product Manager, talks about the nuances of Product Management and life as a Product Manager, Ankur Warikoo warns about the most intoxicating impediment to one’s growth, and Donald Duck comes between an inventor and a #patent.

item.title: अंक‍ 1 – क्या है क्लाउड कंप्यूटिंग? क्लाउड आर्किटेक्ट कैसे बनें? | Career as a Cloud Architect
item.description:
Episode Transcript

पॉडभारती के सभी श्रोता मित्रों का इस नए चैनल सोपान में स्वागत है, मैं हूं देबाशीष चक्रवर्ती। मई 2007, यानि कि लगभग 14 वर्ष पूर्व, मैंने अपने मित्र शशि सिंह के साथ इस पॉडकास्ट की शुरुआत की थी। हमारे अंक पत्रिका, यानि मैगज़ीन फॉर्मेट में होते थे। पर यह सफर सिर्फ नौ अंकों तक चला, और नवंबर 2008 में पॉडकास्ट बंद हो गया। 2008 में ही, पॉडभारती टाटा नेन हॉटेस्ट स्टार्टअप पुरस्कार के लिए नॉमिनेट हुई। हम जीत तो नहीं पाए, पर निर्णय समिति की टिप्पणी थी, “This idea is ahead of its times”।
